title: City Revenue Performance Monitor
problem_statement: We don't know which city is underperforming until it's too late, making it difficult to take timely corrective actions.
objective: Monitor daily revenue by city to catch performance drops early and enable proactive intervention.
audience: Sales managers responsible for regional performance and resource allocation.
action_items: Investigate root causes in underperforming cities
Reallocate marketing and sales resources to struggling regions
Contact regional teams for immediate follow-up on revenue drops
Adjust inventory and promotional strategies based on category performance
